{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220547327EBA3D2C845B9FB33068"}"},"total":910},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6927592508973137920","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书确实不错，把末世写得活灵活现，其中的人也是各有特点。其中主角的多次言语和举动都表现了末世的残酷无情，毫无人性可言。它是一本不错的末世文。但美中不足的是它的草草结尾，让人遗憾。总结:不错，推荐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1612955826,"group_id":"6877128223663066119","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一条梦想成为咸鱼的咸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2HSUJnt3JTaTxG4WkQdxNY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/910390e68143432c85a44ed88d59b54d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708385&x-signature=4oJ%2Bk7v24C3PS0HO9PzSKMHs2nU%3D","user_id":"59713354363","user_name":"墨文先生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"59713354363","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6877128223663066119","book_info":{"abstract":"【叮！宿主达成条件，成功召唤出神兽鲲鹏！】
【叮！宿主达成条件，成功召唤出神兽九尾狐！】
陈欢穿越到了一个末日世界，并且激活了神兽模板系统！
每周都可以获得一个神兽模板！
达成条件之后，便可以将该神兽召唤而出！
不管是天之四灵，还是上古四凶..
陈欢都可以进行召唤！
原本危机四伏，丧尸横行，异兽丛生的末世..
因为这一只只出现的神兽，而发生了翻天覆地的变化！！
看着面前十万只狰狞的丧尸，陈欢淡然的开口道：
“青龙！”
“朱雀！”
